principle: Choose the lowest-sufficient oracle for the claim. A check may establish only what its observable evidence can support.

direct_structure.useWhen: Editable geometry, text metadata, colours, identifiers, hashes, or declared channels are directly available.

mustNotSee: creator explanation of how the world is supposed to work

mustNotInfer: facts absent from both source and artifact

sees: final reader-facing surface under realistic viewing conditions
audience_task.role: terminal oracle for claims about real audience understanding or transfer

requiredInputs: available editable data or deterministic transformation
host_direct.acceptanceBoundary: May establish only directly measured or transformed properties. It cannot infer meaning, preference, comprehension, or factual truth.

requiredInputs: current calibration record for this reader and construct family
model_reader.acceptanceBoundary: Admissible only for the calibrated construct family. It cannot stand in for a source-aware expert or real audience.

controlled_transform.acceptanceBoundary: Establishes sensitivity to one controlled change, not overall visual quality or audience success.

domain_reviewer.acceptanceBoundary: May establish bounded domain or source fidelity. It cannot establish cold-viewer salience, comprehension, or preference.

real_audience.acceptanceBoundary: Supports only the tested audience, surface, condition, and task. A model persona is not a real audience.

asset_hash.operation: Hash the exact asset bytes and compare declared identities.

audience_task.operation: Run the defined reconstruction, comprehension, transfer, or viewing task with the intended audience.

channel_swap_mutation.operation: Swap two declared semantic-channel owners while preserving unrelated presentation properties.

clutter_risk_proxy.operation: Measure declared element density or competing-region load and report it only as a risk proxy.

colour_removal.operation: Remove or neutralize colour while preserving geometry and test whether the required distinction survives.

competitive_semantic_mutation.operation: Strengthen the nearest wrong story without changing overall polish.

consequence_cue_mutation.operation: Remove the cue that carries what happens next while protecting the root event.

continuity_reader.operation: Compare baseline or ordered set with the candidate and localize requested change and protected-property regressions.

direct_structure.operation: Inspect available coordinates, text metadata, colour values, identifiers, hashes, or declared channels.

domain_expert.operation: Apply the explicit domain or source contract to the candidate and localize consequential mismatches.

evidence_reader.operation: Compare candidate, source reference, and must-survive or may-change contract; abstain when source support is absent.

generation_behaviour_test.operation: Ablate one prompt field, regenerate under the same declared conditions, and compare the predicted behavior change.

localized_diff_proxy.operation: Measure change concentration inside and outside declared regions without assigning semantic meaning.

meaning_reader.operation: Reconstruct one movement, strongest competing reading, visible evidence, and usable landing from the final surface.

ocr_box_warning.operation: Inspect OCR boxes and confidence for possible clipping, collision, or unreadable text; report warnings rather than comprehension.

oracle_specific_evidence.operation: Attach evidence produced by the selected primary oracle using that producer kind's canonical record.

perceptual_structure_reader.operation: Return attention order, grouping, alignment, spacing, collisions, legibility, and localized competing detail.

region_relation_proxy.operation: Compare declared region-to-region geometry or topology and report only the measured relation.

region_similarity_proxy.operation: Compare protected regions for structural or perceptual similarity without claiming identity or meaning.

saliency_risk_proxy.operation: Estimate likely attention competition and report it as a risk proxy rather than narrative hierarchy.

semantic_mutation.operation: Change one story-bearing cue while preserving unrelated presentation properties.

style_metadata_proxy.operation: Compare declared style metadata across an ordered set without claiming world coherence by itself.

timed_first_glance.operation: Expose the surface for a bounded interval and record the first region or relation noticed.

world_law_reader.operation: State the governing carrier law, its visible evidence, and any localized physical or spatial violation.

readerCalibration.acceptanceRule: A model reader is admissible only for construct families whose seeded defect it detects, whose harmless mutation it ignores, and whose finding remains stable under input-order reversal.
readerCalibration.subjectiveComparisonRule: Prefer pairwise candidate-versus-baseline comparison with a localized reason and reversed order. Do not treat an absolute aesthetic score as acceptance evidence.

constructs.claim: A cold viewer can state the single change, tension, or relation.
constructs.observable: The reconstructed story names one governing movement from the pixels.
constructs.controlledDefect: remove or replace the pivotal relation
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Keyword overlap or title recovery cannot establish story reconstruction.

constructs.claim: Each visible channel is read as its intended story role without leaking to another role.
constructs.observable: A blind reader assigns colour, texture, form, position, or motion to the intended owner.
constructs.controlledDefect: swap two story-bearing channels or duplicate one across conflicting roles
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Palette consistency cannot establish semantic assignment.

constructs.claim: Attention lands first, second, and third where the story requires.
constructs.observable: The reader returns the intended ordered regions at presentation size.
constructs.controlledDefect: strengthen a secondary region or weaken the primary region
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Size, saturation, or saliency alone cannot establish narrative importance.

constructs.claim: Perceived groups match the intended conceptual groups.
constructs.observable: The reader marks groups before explaining their meaning.
constructs.controlledDefect: move one item across a common region or proximity boundary
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Distance thresholds alone cannot establish grouping in a competing layout.

constructs.claim: The final surface is aligned, evenly spaced, and collision-free at presentation scale.
constructs.observable: Direct geometry passes when available and the raster reader finds no visible drift or collision.
constructs.controlledDefect: offset one repeated item, compress one gap, or introduce a collision
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Raster measurements are warnings when editable geometry is unavailable.

constructs.claim: Text is readable at the intended size and its hierarchy is coherent.
constructs.observable: OCR, contrast, font metadata, and simulated viewing all support comfortable reading.
constructs.controlledDefect: reduce one key label below the reading floor or collapse type hierarchy
constructs.stoppingBoundary: OCR success alone cannot establish projected comfort.

constructs.claim: Required distinctions survive contrast loss, colour-vision differences, and monochrome.
constructs.observable: The same distinction remains recoverable under deterministic transformations.
constructs.controlledDefect: remove the non-colour cue or collapse contrast
constructs.stoppingBoundary: A generic aesthetic reader cannot establish accessibility.

constructs.claim: Viewers infer the intended meaning of colours rather than only noticing difference.
constructs.observable: A blind reader maps colours to the intended concepts before labels are revealed.
constructs.controlledDefect: swap semantically opposed colours while preserving contrast
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Contrast or colour distance cannot establish meaning.

constructs.claim: Mutually explanatory text and visuals are encountered together while decoration stays subordinate.
constructs.observable: The reader links each explanation to its intended visual region without search.
constructs.controlledDefect: separate one explanatory label from its object or strengthen decoration
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Whitespace percentage or element count cannot establish coherence.

constructs.claim: The intended relation is recovered without excessive search or competing detail.
constructs.observable: A timed reconstruction succeeds and competing regions are localized.
constructs.controlledDefect: add plausible but story-irrelevant detail near the primary path
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Minimal appearance or one clutter score cannot establish comprehension effort.

constructs.claim: The visual reaches the declared consequence level without claiming a farther level.
constructs.observable: A blind reader states what happens next and why at the declared reach.
constructs.controlledDefect: remove the consequence-bearing cue
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Object detection or caption similarity cannot establish reach.

constructs.claim: The representation makes the mechanism recognizable while allowing transfer beyond its surface.
constructs.observable: The viewer names the mechanism and applies it to a changed case.
constructs.controlledDefect: add irrelevant concrete detail or remove the mechanism-bearing cue
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Detail amount alone cannot establish abstraction quality or transfer.

constructs.claim: The selected world naturally exposes the governing relation better than its nearest alternative.
constructs.observable: A pairwise reader identifies which carrier makes the required inference easier and why.
constructs.controlledDefect: replace the carrier with a visually attractive world whose native reading competes with the target
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Style preference or prompt adherence cannot establish carrier fit.

constructs.claim: The visual obeys the causal rules of its chosen world.
constructs.observable: The reader identifies one governing law and world-native evidence without illegal cues.
constructs.controlledDefect: seed impossible flow, contradictory affordance, or inconsistent scale
constructs.stoppingBoundary: A generic plausibility score cannot establish a scene-specific law.

constructs.claim: The target mechanism is more available than the strongest plausible misreading.
constructs.observable: One reader reconstructs the story and another independently names the strongest wrong reading.
constructs.controlledDefect: strengthen the known wrong reading while preserving surface polish
constructs.stoppingBoundary: An informed judge answering whether the intention is clear is self-confirming.

constructs.claim: Paths, crossings, barriers, reflections, flows, and actions could occur as shown.
constructs.observable: A scene-specific reader or domain expert can trace a feasible path or action.
constructs.controlledDefect: break a path, reverse an impossible flow, or introduce an inaccessible crossing
constructs.stoppingBoundary: A generic multimodal model alone is insufficient for consequential infrastructure or safety facts.

constructs.claim: Evidence is findable and readable without becoming the main story or rescuing an unsupported claim.
constructs.observable: A source-aware reader finds the claim link while a cold reader still follows the visual story first.
constructs.controlledDefect: enlarge the citation layer or detach a claim from its source
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Citation presence cannot establish support or subordination.

constructs.claim: Case-defining source relations survive reconstruction while allowed presentation properties may change.
constructs.observable: A side-by-side reviewer applies an explicit must-survive and may-change contract.
constructs.controlledDefect: alter one case-defining relation while preserving style
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Pixel or embedding similarity cannot establish factual fidelity.

constructs.claim: The requested change occurred while protected properties remained stable.
constructs.observable: A baseline-aware reader localizes the delta and any protected-property regression.
constructs.controlledDefect: change one protected property outside the requested region
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Whole-image similarity cannot establish preservation of a named property.

constructs.claim: One frame carries the relation, or each additional frame earns a necessary state change.
constructs.observable: Ordered reading succeeds and shuffling changes or destroys the recovered sequence.
constructs.controlledDefect: duplicate a beat, remove a state change, or shuffle order
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Frame count or caption continuity cannot establish necessity.

constructs.claim: Entities, world, perspective, and semantic channels persist while only the declared state changes.
constructs.observable: The reader localizes identity continuity and the declared delta across frames.
constructs.controlledDefect: swap an entity, channel, perspective, or world asset in one beat
constructs.stoppingBoundary: Global similarity or a shared seed cannot establish narrative continuity.

constructs.claim: The prompt contains the information needed to generate the intended function, hierarchy, and constraints.
constructs.observable: Required fields are present and field ablation produces the predicted visual degradation.
constructs.controlledDefect: remove one mechanism-bearing prompt field
constructs.stoppingBoundary: A well-formed prompt without a rendered result cannot establish generation behaviour.

constructs.claim: An ordered visual set feels authored in one world while meaningful differences remain visible.
constructs.observable: A baseline-aware pairwise reader recovers shared world laws and case-specific differences from a contact sheet.
constructs.controlledDefect: change one surface's perspective, texture law, typography, or channel semantics
constructs.stoppingBoundary: An isolated surface or one style-similarity score cannot establish coherence across an ordered visual set.

constructs.claim: Among meaning- and evidence-safe candidates, one has better balance, rhythm, tension, and finish.
constructs.observable: Pairwise preference remains stable under order reversal and includes a localized reason.
constructs.controlledDefect: seed one localized rhythm, balance, or finish defect
constructs.stoppingBoundary: An absolute model score or a vote from near-identical model judges cannot establish taste.

constructs.claim: The intended audience can recover, use, and transfer the visual under realistic conditions.
constructs.observable: Timed reconstruction, confidence, near-case application, and error coding succeed.
constructs.controlledDefect: remove the relation needed for near-case application
constructs.stoppingBoundary: No internal validator can establish real audience transfer.

constructs.claim: No critical construct is hidden by strength elsewhere.
constructs.observable: Every selected hard gate clears and the lowest credible gate controls readiness.
constructs.controlledDefect: seed one failed hard gate into an otherwise strong packet
constructs.stoppingBoundary: A composite or average score cannot establish readiness.
